sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id INTEGER, amount INTEGER, sale_date DATE);
SELECT id, amount, lag(amount, 1, 0) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) AS previous_amount FROM sales;
UPDATE sales SET amount = amount + 50 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, amount, lag(amount, 2, 0) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) AS two_days_ago_amount FROM sales;
